title: Thoughts of the Noob Episode 1 Act 1
display_title: Thoughts of the Noob Episode 1 Act 1
wikitext:
[]: Thoughts of the Noob. Episode 1. Act 1. Post by birdyofthemoongoddess » Mon Nov 05, 2007 9:41 pm The first 9 minutes and 50 seconds of the first episode. 1. The opening song... I've heard worse. But, seeing as it is and older anime, I won't object too much. 2. about 2 minutes of the way into the movie... the noise.. oh god... WHAT IS THAT NOISE!!?!?!?!? It's.... a buzzing... like... cicadas??? or... something... Usually, it is played while showing telephone poles... BUT WHAT IS IT!??!?!?!?!?!?? 3. Oh! How cute! His voice is so pretty! :) *huggles pretty Shinji's voice* :) 4. nice pic of whats-her-face. (I've seen this part before... I remember him on the phone ;p).. haha, the arrow pointing to her cleavage. ;p nice nice. 5. blue haired girl! (is this, like, the first foreshadowing of the fact that the anime is messed up?) 6. Oh wow... angels are even uglier than I first thought... ew... 7. HAHA nice explosions there... big white circles. ;p 8. oh!! But it's face!!! kawaii!! :) The angel's face when it turns its head and blinks!! : ))) 9. Well, they REALLY dislike angel's... seeing as the guy snaps his pen in half when saying that they need to stop "the target" at all costs... 10. ... was he against her boob?? (when the dark haired lady is looking out of the car window with the binoculars.) haha he looked a bit uncomfortable. ;p 11. Ikari-kun?? Interesting honorific for him... used by those old guys... (him = Shinji's dad) 12. Back-up pilot?? So, they had one, but now they don't?

[]: Post by Shiro » Mon Nov 05, 2007 9:48 pm Yeah, those are cicadas. And you hear them a hell of a lot. They are called Angels, but they aren't really angels. The Japanese word for Angel, as in a Christian angel is てんし。　（I know you can read that now, so...) The Japanese word used to describe the angels in NGE is しろ。　This means something more like "messenger" I believe.

[]: Post by birdyofthemoongoddess » Mon Nov 05, 2007 9:50 pm Shiro wrote: Yeah, those are cicadas. And you hear them a hell of a lot. They are called Angels, but they aren't really angels. The Japanese word for Angel, as in a Christian angel is てんし。　（I know you can read that now, so...) The Japanese word used to describe the angels in NGE is しろ。　This means something more like "messenger" I believe.

[]: Post by Shiro » Mon Nov 05, 2007 9:51 pm Jeez, don't get uptight...

[]: Post by birdyofthemoongoddess » Mon Nov 05, 2007 9:55 pm ... I'm not... I'm telling you that I know that they're not angelic angels... Seeing as I knew it before and about 20 people have told me since I logged on to the boards this morning...

[]: Post by chee » Mon Nov 05, 2007 9:58 pm Welcome to the jungle. You might never escape. :)

[]: Post by Kaminoyouni » Mon Nov 05, 2007 10:03 pm You think 'a Cruel Angel's Thesis' is "bad"? someone stop me from strangling this person.

[]: Post by chee » Mon Nov 05, 2007 10:05 pm Please, no killing newbies. Unless the newbie in question is Rush Limbaugh.

[]: Post by Shiro » Mon Nov 05, 2007 10:07 pm Cruel Angel's Thesis is a classic. But everyone has their own tastes in music...

[]: Post by birdyofthemoongoddess » Mon Nov 05, 2007 10:11 pm Kaminoyouni wrote: You think 'a Cruel Angel's Thesis' is "bad"? someone stop me from strangling this person.

[]: Post by birdyofthemoongoddess » Mon Nov 05, 2007 10:11 pm Shiro wrote: Cruel Angel's Thesis is a classic. But everyone has their own tastes in music...

[]: Post by Kaminoyouni » Mon Nov 05, 2007 10:11 pm chee wrote: Please, no killing newbies. Unless the newbie in question is Rush Limbaugh.

[]: Post by birdyofthemoongoddess » Mon Nov 05, 2007 10:12 pm chee wrote: Please, no killing newbies. Unless the newbie in question is Rush Limbaugh.

[]: Post by Squiggy » Mon Nov 05, 2007 10:31 pm Cruel Angel's Thesis was actually voted as the number one anime opening of all time by 2channal 100-61 http://youtube.com/watch?v=sEc8CBpnQ9w 60-21 http://youtube.com/watch?v=-UVwAXWnWCA 20-1 http://youtube.com/watch?v=B8SWxW-7cqc For some reason Japs can't count so Eva didn't technically make "Number One" but it was the "Grand Winner" Oh well, different people have different tastes

[]: Re: Thoughts of the Noob. Episode 1. Act 1. Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Nov 05, 2007 10:36 pm birdyofthemoongoddess wrote: 1. The opening song... I've heard worse. But, seeing as it is and older anime, I won't object too much.
